event_info: starts bang on with a slider around off stump; Abhishek guides it to backward point
slightly outside off stump; Abhishek goes back and guides it between cover-point and point for his first runs of the day
nothing lose from Matthew Short. Great stuff! Flatter delivery just outside off stump; Head can only cut and find the man at point
hints at moving around in the crease; so Matthew Short fires this full; pushed to mid-on
flat and on the middle and leg stump; Abhishek pushes it to long-off

the first real spray of the over and it's finished down the leg-side. Sanju puts out a soft shout; but it's a wide. One of those appeals you see on the field to distract the ump for the wide but the ump is alert enough
slider; cuts and finds cover-point

is Mukesh going to continue from where he left here in Uppal a couple of years ago? Make that 33 runs off his last 7 balls at this venue. Abhishek Sharma loves slapping through the off-side and Mukesh Choudhary has fed him a short of length delivery with width. Abhishek says thank you and lofts it over cover
now the overcorrection and bowls fullish on the pads; flicked over mid-wicket but it's cut off in the deep
short of length delivery outside off stump; Abhishek guides square of the wicket
short delivery and Head ducks under it. One for the over called by the ump
smart short of length delivery that gave no room; Head could only push it to the left of the fielder
1 run; short of length delivery on the pads; could have been put away but Head misses the glances and wears it on the thigh pad. Pretty good recovery after the first ball by Mukesh Choudhary
Travis Head is itching to break-free and advances; Short darts this full and finds the inside edge. Ball rolls towards mid-wicket

unlike Travis Head; Abhishek Sharma stays put and belts this full slot ball down the ground over long-on. Full and on the stumps; he's changed his ploy from sliders around off stump to force the cut and paid the price. Abhishek got under it and timed it sweetly
and the moment he goes back to sliders just outside off stump; he's making like difficult for Abhishek. Lucky that the under edge didn't go back onto the stumps and went to short fine leg
cut to the off-side and he finds cover-point
again he wants to step out and hit but Short is giving him no room and not bowling right under his bat for him to loft; pushed to the left of the bowler
this time he manages to drive it to long-off. Still only 9 off that over from Short despite the six
missed his length and that's exactly what Travis Head needed to get going. It's full; it's wide enough for Travis Head to free his arms and he lofts it handsomely over cover

uppish and just in front of Noor! Head wanted to loft on the rise but this wasn't as full; so didn't get the timing right. Noor came forward at cover but it fell well short. Did well to get the body behind and stop the four
short of length delivery on the leg stump; Head looks to slog; mistimes to mid-wicket
short of length delivery just outside off stump; Head cuts but they have a sweeper on the off-side and it's just one
sliced away over cover. Full and around the leg stump; Abhishek steps out; also makes room and lofts it over the infield for four more

he's sliced this so fine! Again advancing; again making room. Anshul Kamboj tried to cramp him for room but the problem was he's bowled too full in his last two balls and has been taken for two fours. Thick edge this time and third man was up. Good over for SRH - 15 off it
flatter delivery; Head pulls to deep mid-wicket

belted down the ground. The plan was simple from Matthew Short. Flat and around off stump; so Abhishek Sharma understood that and stood leg-side to flat bat down the ground and he's connected this sweetly
lovely batting last ball has forced Matthew Short to think and he's changed his length to full. Abhishek lets this ball come and lofts it over mid-on for four more.

now he goes inside-out and lofts it over cover. This is excellent batting from Abhishek. He's taking toll of the third straight over from Matthew Short and made CSK wonder if they overdid! Full delivery; not timed that well; Rutu gives chases and pushes it back but the ball still escapes and touches the rope
he loves backing away and slapping over cover. Darted on the stumps; slightly full so Abhishek got under it and belted it easily over cover and it sailed deep into the stands

he's unstoppable now and he's smacked 25 runs off this Short over after eating all those dots early on. Races to a 15-ball fifty and does his signature celebration. Slot ball; another off-side slap and he's one of the best in that region. The home fans are delighted
short of length delivery outside off stump; Head gets under it and lofts over wide mid-off and the carnage continues
mistimes the off-side slash and finds the fielder
field on the off-side and he bowls a leg-side yorker; Head gets inside the line and flicks it behind square to get himself going again
he says I'm not getting left behind; Abhishek Sharma! Full and outside off stump; Head squeezes it hard and drills it past point and it rockets to the fence

ball_event: out Caught by Ruturaj Gaikwad!! Oh that's a great diving catch by the CSK skipper. Would you believe it
event_info: he's mistimed a full toss to hand but CSK will say it's the round the wicket and wide yorker ploy that's worked in their favour here. Head probably didn't pick it up well and seemed a bit surprised as he met the bat. Reacted a wee bit late and the ball caught him high on the bat. Rutu judged that he had to dive forward and timed it to perfection; grabbing it an inch off the ground and then gestures he caught that super clean. Relief for Rutu and CSK. Travis Head c Ruturaj Gaikwad b Mukesh Choudhary 23(20) [4s-3 6s-1]

ball_event: out Caught by Ruturaj Gaikwad!! Now
event_info: now; this is a sitter for Rutu at mid-off. Another very unlikely ball that fetches a wicket. That's a hit me slot ball. Ishan Kishan felt he had to accept the gift and went real hard but lost his shape totally on the shot; so the bat turned in his hands and he sliced it high to mid-off. Did the ball stop on the batter? We will have the microscopes on it. Ishan Kishan c Ruturaj Gaikwad b Mukesh Choudhary 0(1)
FOUR; oh Sanju has let this widish length delivery go right past him. Bonus runs for SRH
that's too wide of off says the ump
full and on the stumps; Abhishek drills it to long-on
leg-side offering but Klaasen is kind enough to flick this to short fine leg
turning back in; Klaasen flicks to mid-wicket

Shivam Dube has dropped a sitter. He's not a swift fielder and seemed a bit lazy with that effort. He actually got there running to the right; had everything covered and got both hands but the balance was just not there as he had to kind of lunge at it last second. Googly on the leg stump; Abhishek Sharma pulls; hits it flat to deep backward square leg and got lucky
1 run; googly down the leg-side; Klaasen misses the sweep. Ball hits the pad and rolls to the on-side
tapped to point
lofted nicely over cover! He will smack you every time you let him have a free swing through the off-side. Too full; wide enough and out came the trademark lofted drive
driven past cover but it's cut off in the deep
short of length delivery outside off stump; Abhishek drives towards cover
1 run; full and angling in; Klaasen misses the glance; ball rolls off the pad to backward square leg

roars Jamie Overton with a smile as he sees the spike on UltraEdge on the big screen. The good old Test Match hard length that Jamie Overton has bowled so well this season. Abhishek Sharma stood leg-side of this ball to guide it to third man but he got an outside edge. Sanju celebrated softly immediately but he was so confident inside that he asked Rutu to review this and got the massive breakthrough for CSK. Abhishek Sharma c Sanju Samson b Jamie Overton 59(22) [4s-6 6s-4]
good length delivery; Klaasen defends
flicked away way over mid-wicket. Full and on the leg stump; Klaasen gets under and times it sweetly for the ball to sail a long way

oh hang on; that slower ball has gripped and bounced as well. Watchout folks! If it's behaving this way; SRH have done well and just need to bat sensibly and not lose their way. Klaasen was surprised by the bounce and turn that took it past his bat
and again! This time just the turn away from the RHB; Klaasen let it pass
full delivery on the leg stump; Klaasen flicks through backward square leg
good length delivery angling away; Aniket defends towards point
googly turning away; Klaasen drives to long-off. Bowled Noor; chirps Sanju
keeps it tight on the stumps; tucked to long-on. Oh yes; he says now from behind the stumps

wrong 'un and it goes past Klaasen. In fact it went off the outside edge and Sanju Samson had no chance. They want to make Klaasen swing across the line to his goolies and so far Klaasen hasn't been able to line Noor Ahmad up
smart batting! Gets inside the line early knowing Noor Ahmad is only going to bowl the googly; Klaasen manages to pull this fine past short fine leg and it goes for four more
flicked firmly to deep mid-wicket
full delivery; Aniket slogs and hits it on the bounce to deep square leg

ball_event: out Caught by Noor Ahmad!! The short ball into the wicket and he gets that extra bounce. Aniket Verma just wasn't there to handle the bumper. Tried the pull shot
event_info: spliced it so high and Noor tracked it easily moving to his right to put Jamie Overton on a hat-trick. SRH need to be careful of not attacking too much and losing track. Looks like 200 will be quite competitive. Aniket Verma c Noor Ahmad b Jamie Overton 2(4)
safely negotiates this good length delivery and knocks it to mid-on
swipes too far across the line to this short of length delivery and misses
full delivery angling in; Klaasen flicks and sends it to deep mid-wicket. In the gap for two
and again! Klaasen taps gently this time so he doesn't sprint on the first run. Knows he has enough time for two hitting that pocket at mid-wicket and this is smart batting
knocks a single to long-on and keeps strike
low full toss; Klaasen flicks to long-on
short of length delivery on the off stump; Nitish drives to long-on
slower delivery; Klaasen taps it back to the bowler

a neat textbook off-drive that you so dearly don't want any fielder to cut it off just for the way it was met. Sarfaraz throws himself fully to the right and long-off and slides; gets a hand on it but couldn't stop the ball. Full and outside off stump; Klaasen plays a delightful shot that tempts you to call it the shot of the day
tapped to long-off

he's actually flicked a slower ball over long-on. Was he a bit early into the shot? If yes; how did he manage to still time it so neat. The bowler shouldn't be too disappointed with that hit because he almost deceived the batter. Just incredible timing and talent
short delivery; Klaasen pulls to deep mid-wicket
cramped for room; Reddy flicks to mid-wicket. Brevis attacks the ball from the deep but doesn't pick it up to deny the second run
flatter and just outside off stump; Nitish watchfully taps it to point
short ball; Nitish looks to pull; mistimes on the bounce to long-on
third man up and he's smartly reversed the shot over short third. In fact he's switched the hands for a switch hit and played it so fine and over the infield
oh leading edge pops uppishly to the left of the bowler as Klaasen looks to flick early
short delivery; Nitish pulls and sends it to deep mid-wicket
unlucky for the bowler! Jamie Overton bowled a good slower ball bumper; Klaasen wasn't comfortable on the pull and got a top edge that escaped between Sanju and short fine leg
very full now and Klaasen flicks to deep mid-wicket and steals another two
short of length delivery around off stump; Klaasen pulls to mid-wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Matthew Short!! In the airrr
event_info: not enough legs but enough power in the legs for Matt Short to time the jump to perfection and grab this overhead while ensuring he didn't step back on the rope. What was the length that worked for Jamie Overton? No surprises that he's banged this into the wicket. Nitish Kumar Reddy couldn't handle the bounce; tried to pull and mistimed it to hole out. Nitish Reddy c Matthew Short b Jamie Overton 12(8) [6s-1]
works it to mid-on
full delivery outside off stump; Salil taps it to cover
yorker on the stumps; Klaasen digs it out
another very good yorker; Klaasen flicks to deep mid-wicket
now he's bowled a great slower ball that forces a dab to point
but it's all about pouncing on the loose ball of the over and the bowler generally offers one every single over. Tried the yorker and offered a low full toss; Salil lofted it over cover

Lovely back of the hand slower delivery that angled across the left-hander; Salil let it pass thinking it will be a wide. The onfield thought so but the replay showed the ball was just a millimetre inside the line on the replay
take that! The Klassic slog-sweep from Klaasen. Full delivery angling away; Klaasen gets under it and muscles it high over mid-wicket
googly on the leg stump; knocked to deep mid-wicket and that's the 10th IPL fifty for Heinrich Klaasen. Gently raises the bat to the crowd and the dugout . SRH owner Kaviya Maran stands and applauds
flatter and angling away; Salil taps it to deep cover
wristed to deep mid-wicket
flatter delivery outside off stump; Salil taps it to the off-side
beaten on the inside edge! Flatter delivery turning back in; Salil plays outside the line and misses the ball
short of length delivery into the pitch; Klaasen mistimes the pull to mid-wicket. Oh Jamie Overton fails to collect the throw. It bursts through the hands and brushes the cheek
in the airrr; Sarfaraz couldn't get there in time running to the left from long-off
thick edge and it runs away fine! Length delivery outside off stump; Klaasen looks to slog; toe-ends it fine and it escapes to the right of Sanju and third was up as well
length delivery down the leg-side
slower delivery; Klaasen flicks to long-on
short of length delivery; Klaasen pulls to deep mid-wicket
slot ball and punished over mid-wicket. Full delivery just outside off stump; Salil gets his front leg away and smacks it over mid-wicket
and Anshul Kamboj is back into the attack for some round the wicket wide yorkers. Klaasen looks to squeeze it out but misses

ball_event: out Bowled!! Oh he's dragged on! This is a big dent that he's made into the SRH dugout. Nailed this off-side yorker
event_info: Klaasen trried to hit it hard; thick edge shattered the middle stump and he walks back after a great innings. Didn't let his side feel the pressure of quick wickets. Held one end but also scored. Heinrich Klaasen b Anshul Kamboj 59(39) [4s-6 6s-2]
1 run; leg-side yorker; Livingstone misses the flick; ball goes to short fine leg
another brilliant yorker from Anshul. Salil could only dig it out behind square
make that five great yorkers in a row. Livingstone looks to drive; inside edge rolls back to the right of the bowler
he does move across but he's missed this wide yorker trying to squeeze it past point

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Left-arm angle wide line and Salil doesn't middle it. Picks out deep cover to perfection. Full and wide of off stump
event_info: Salil tried to smash it over cover but he sliced that a bit and it went squarer. Salil Arora c Dewald Brevis b Gurjapneet Singh 13(12) [4s-2]

they are nailing the yorkers; Shivang hits this to cover. Liam Livingstone was keen on a quick single and had to dive back home. Sarfaraz hinted at having a shy but didn't throw and it brings out a smile from Livingstone. Maybe there was no one backing up.
great yorker again; Shivang digs it out
slower delivery outside off stump; Shivang swings and misses
he slogs way too early and gets beaten again by a clever slower delivery angling away
flicked and it clears the rope at deep mid-wicket. Just misses the yorker and bowls a leg-side ball; Shivang gets under it so well and timed it really well to clear the fielder at the fence
back to the off-side yorker; Shivang drills it to cover and keeps strike with the quick single
wide yorker from round the wicket; Shivang drives and finds long-off
the wide yorker again. Not quite a yorker; but Livingstone is struggling to come to terms with the pitch and mistimes the drive along the ground to long-off

smart cricket from Shivang. He moved across so Anshul Kamboj went for the leg stump yorker; missed his mark and bowled a low full toss. Shivang played that with one hand and helps it away fine to the right of short fine leg

ball_event: out Caught by Gurjapneet Singh!! In the airrr
event_info: Gurjapneet has to run to the right from short fine and stretch forward; taken nicely. Full and following the batter as he backed away; he also took pace off and Shivang was early in there trying to scoop. He lobbed it to backward square leg as he got too close to the pitch of the ball. Shivang Kumar c Gurjapneet Singh b Anshul Kamboj 12(8) [4s-1 6s-1]
1 run; leaves the wide yorker alone but it's well inside the line. Meanwhile; Liam Livingstone steals a bye and they review in vain

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Taken at deep mid-wicket and Sunrisers have still not managed to record a 200+ total against CSK. He's nailed yorkers after yorkers and another one has got him a wicket. This time Liam Livingstone made decent contact but deep mid-wicket pouched it safely. Liam Livingstone c Dewald Brevis b Anshul Kamboj 1(5)
event_info: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Taken at deep mid-wicket and Sunrisers have still not managed to record a 200+ total against CSK. He's nailed yorkers after yorkers and another one has got him a wicket. This time Liam Livingstone made decent contact but deep mid-wicket pouched it safely. Liam Livingstone c Dewald Brevis b Anshul Kamboj 1(5)

what a start from Sanju. He's hit it too well. Was short and into his body; Samson plays the pull. Had his eyes on the ball and goes through with the shot. Praful Hinge had his arms out in celebration as the ball sails straight towards fine leg. New ball had enough legs to sail over the fielder and Hinge had to cut short his celebration
short and wide outside off; Samson cuts it wide of point
good length delivery outside off Gaikwad looks to poke away and gets beaten
good length delivery on off; defended back to Praful Hinge
width on offer and Gaikwad gets off the mark with a classical cover drive. Gets a big stride forward and picks the gap on the off-side
Praful bowls it too straight and pays the penalty. Gaikwad gets inside the line of the ball and clips it fine. Raced away along the turf for four towards fine leg

ball_event: out Caught by Heinrich Klaasen!! This is a big
event_info: big wicket for SRH. Nitish Reddy runs in and bowls a shortish length delivery outside off; just a hint of shape away that made it hard for Samson to time. Goes for the pull; the line was outside off and moving further away; hence the ball takes the toe end of the bat and skies towards mid-on. Klaasen runs to his right; settles under the ball and takes it cleanly. Sanju Samson c Heinrich Klaasen b Nitish Reddy 7(3) [6s-1]
another back of a length delivery that moves away a touch. Mhatre chops the drive to the on-side
full and outside off; Mhatre clears his front foot and looks to go big straight down the ground. Plays down the wrong line and gets beaten by a long way
back of a length delivery just outside off; Mhatre stands tall and punches it to cover

Heinrich Klaasen nearly caught a blinder. He runs sideways and dives with outstretched hands; but the ball brushes his fingers and falls to ground. Mhatre mistimes the pull; very similar to what Sanju played. The ball skies over Klassen at mid-on; who did really well to get so close
sprayed down the leg; wide called
half-volley on middle; driven straight down the ground. Past the bowler and into the fence in a hurry
Mhatre just keeps going. Picks the length early and swivels across to pull. Doesn't bother to keep it down and he has timed it so well that the ball flies over mid-wicket fence
punched off the back foot to cover
now goes inside out over cover. Gives himself room and thumps it over cover to a length delivery outside off. One bounce and over the fence
banged in short at the batter; well over Mhatre. Wide called
another short delivery from Hinge. Another wide called as it was over the batter
in the air but picks the gap beautifully. Slightly short and wide outside off; Mhatre throws his bat at it and slaps it over cover-point. Was hit with some real power

straight this time and four more. Not a bad ball from Hinge. Mhatre is in such form that he can hit anything. Flat bats the back of a length delivery wide of the bowler's reach. Mid-off was nowhere near
just over the mid-off fielder and races away for four more. 24 runs coming off it. This was a slower delivery wide of off. Mhatre toes ends the chip just over mid-off's reach
horrible start for Sakib Hussain. Bowls it well down the leg. No chance for the keeper despite a desperate dive. Starts with five wides and CSK are off to a flier. 52 in just 18 balls
angled in on the pads; tucked to the on-side
short delivery at the batter; Gaikwad sinks under and looks to upper cut it over the keeper. Misses and wasn't called a wide. He takes the review and loses one early in the innings
good length delivery outside off; driven to cover for a quick single
slower delivery at 115.1ks. Mhatre had to wait as he was slightly early on the shot. Flat batted to mid-off
good length delivery on off; Gaikwad drops it in front of cover for a run
banged in short well outside off; wide called for height

short delivery angling in; was a slower one too. Mhatre is on the front foot as he goes for the pull. Another toe ender from Mhatre; but has enough meat to clear the in-field and the outfield does the rest
full and down the leg; Gaikwad falls over as he tries to flick. Wide called
good length delivery outside off; Ruturaj Gaikwad gets a thick inisde edge as he looks to force it to the off-side. The ball runs down to fine leg past his leg-stump

50-run stand comes up with a risky two. Mhatre would have been walking back to the pavillion had Abhishek hit. Gaikwad tucks it to mid-wicket and calls for two. Mhatre was a little late to respond; yet goes for the second. Abhishek throws at the bowler's end; but there is no one backing up which allowed him to get back
Gaikwad pushes it to mid-on and sets off for a single. Was an easy single; but Mhatre couldn't run. He limps to the other end and just about manages to make it in

ball_event: out Caught by Heinrich Klaasen!! What a catch from Klaasen. He runs to his left
event_info: jumps and sticks his hand out. The ball stuck in his fingers as he falls to ground. Coming to the ball - Mhatre looked to clear the in-field. The ball comes off the toe end to the left of mid-off; where Klaasen takes another splendid catch to remove the dangerous Mhatre. Nitish Reddy gets his second and the crowd erupts. Replays show that the ball was caught in the left hand and as he was falling; Klaasen managed to balance it with the other hand and hang on. Ayush Mhatre c Heinrich Klaasen b Nitish Reddy 30(13) [4s-5 6s-1]
good length delivery on off; defended
half-volley outside off; driven straight to mid-off

ball_event: out Caught by Salil Arora!! A big
event_info: big wicket in the context of this game. Eshan Malinga gets the breakthrough in his first delivery. Bowls a short delivery at the body; Gaikwad gets in a tangle as he tries to hook. The ball takes the glove and lobs to Salil Arora for a simple catch. Ruturaj Gaikwad drops his head with disappoinment and has to make the long way back to the pavillion. Ruturaj Gaikwad c Salil Arora b Eshan Malinga 19(13) [4s-3]
width on offer outside off; Sarfaraz cuts it wide of third man and gets off the mark with a brace
sliding down the leg; wide called
misfield allows the batters to get across. Tucked straight to mid-wicket; the fielder fumbles letting Sarfaraz to get a run
wonderful shot from Short to get off the mark. Short on middle; Short rocks on the back foot and nails the pull. Hit with conviction and it raced away through mid-wicket
sprayed into the pads; tucked to the on-side
slower delivery on off; Sarfaraz Khan dabs it down to short third man
wrong 'un outside off; Sarfaraz steers it down to short third man

poor effort from Aniket at sweeper cover. He did well initially; runs across and got his hands to the ball; but the momentum took him over the ropes. He lost his composure and stepped over the ropes while holding the ball. This was short outside off; cut to the left of sweeper cover
Sarfaraz taps it wide of point for a single
leg-break outside off; Short goes on the back foot and punches it to sweeper cover
tight line from Shivang Kumar. Sarfaraz defends it to point

another poor effort on the field. This time from the SRH skipper. Wasn't a run; Ishan slides over the ball lets it pass. Sarfaraz gets a leading edge as he closes the bat face early. The ball rolls to the left of cover
in the slot and greets Abhishek with a boundary. Sarfaraz clears his front foot and pumps it straight back over the bowler's head. One bounce and over the fence for four
Sarfaraz goes for another big heave. Gets a thick inside edge to square leg
Short is quick on the back foot and cuts it wide of cover
half-volley outside off; driven wide of cover. The fielder slides to his left and covers the line; but the ball bounces just infront of him and passes him for four
flatter delivery outside off; driven down to long-off
on the shorter side outside off; Sarfaraz cuts it to sweeper cover

in the air and did that carry? Replay shows it just falls short of the diving fielder. Sarfaraz gets a thick outside edge that flies towards Hinge at short third man. Good effort by the fielder to dive forward and stop it on the bounce
leg-break on middle; defended to the off-side
Short knocks it to the off-side
leg-break on off; Short jumps on the back foot and punches it to sweeper cover
yorker on middle; Sarfaraz jams it out to vacant cover. Misfield at the bowler's end allows the duo to get back for a brace. 100 comes up for CSK
short on middle and leg; Sarfaraz gets inside the line and scoops it over short fine. Gets the elevation needed and the flies over the fielder
slower delivery on middle; Short gets a thick inside edge to deep square leg
this was right in the slot. Sarfaraz goes for the big shot; doesn't get a hang off it. Heaves it off the inside half of the bat to the on-side
too straight from Sakib Hussain. Short whips it off the pads to deep square leg. Couple more to the total
cutter outside off; Short flat bats it down to long-off
angled in on the pads; tucked to deep square leg
yorker on middle; Short digs it out to long-on
low full-toss on middle; Matthew Short gets forward and drives it down to long-on
full on off; Sarfaraz Khan gets forward to drive and hits it straight to the fielder at mid-off. That sped off the bat but no placement
slower-ball off-cutter and short outside off; Sarfaraz Khan waits to cut and misses; wanted to help it over short third man; but fails to connect

ball_event: out Caught by Nitish Reddy!! One hand comes off the bat-handle and he has found deep square-leg. Full on middle
event_info: Sarfaraz Khan stays back and flicks; loses his bottom-hand and picks out the safe hands of Nitish Reddy. Timely wicket for SRH. Sarfaraz Khan c Nitish Reddy b Eshan Malinga 25(19) [4s-3]
short outside off; good delivery first up. Dewald Brevis does well actually; drops his gloves just in time. The ball flies close to it; but he has left that well
slower-ball and tennis-ball bounce on this short of length delivery outside off; Dewald Brevi hops a little and lets it go. Two dots in a row
tossed up full on off; Matthew Short gets forward to drive and picks out extra-cover; on the edge of the ring
flat good length outside off; Matthew Short goes on the back foot and pulls it down to long-on
flat good length and the googly turns away from outside off; Dewald Brevis goes on the back foot and cuts hard but picks out backward point. Abhishek there does well

ball_event: out Caught by Liam Livingstone at long-off!! This was always on the cards. It's tossed up on off and Dewald Brevis' eyes light up. He gets forward to loft and doesn't get the timing right. Off the bottom of the bat and he slices across the ball. Was the googly and the longest part of the fence
event_info: lots of height and no elevation. Easily taken at long-off. Livingstone has safe hands. Dewald Brevis c Liam Livingstone b Shivang Kumar 0(4)

on a length outside off; turns away a hint; Shivam Dube gets forward to stab at it; the ball rolls to backward point; Dube was slow to get off the blocks. But the throw comes to the keeper instead of the bowler's end. Had it gone there; Dube was in strife
low full-toss outside off; Matthew Short gets forward and reaches for it to drive it to long-off
short of length just outside off; Matthew Short goes on the back foot and pulls to long-on. That short-arm jab of Short
dug in short at Shivam Dube; he goes on the back foot and pulls to deep square-leg
slower-ball off-cutter on a good length outside off; Matthew Short gets forward to drive it back to Nitish Kumar Reddy
slower-ball off-cutter and full on off; Matthew Short gets forward to drive to long-on
full outside off; Shivam Dube gets forward to drive it to long-off
full outside off; Matthew Short shuffles across and gets forward to drive it to long-off

2 runs; low full-toss on off; Matthew Short gets forward to flick wide of deep mid-wicket. Easy two and Praful Hinge has cut the return crease with his back leg; so it will be a no-ball. A free-hit coming up for Short
full and right up there on the stumps; Matthew Short clears his front leg and gets forward to drive to long-on
right up there; yorker length and on off; Shivam Dube gets forward to drive it back to Praful Hinge. Sakib helps Dube in tying his shoelaces
good short delivery and it rushes Shivam Dube; he goes on the back foot to pull and then bails out. Called one short delivery for the over. That was a quick delivery
in the slot and six. It's full and on off; Shivam Dube gets forward to loft; the power of Dube and it's all the way over long-on. Timed that so well
full and angling into the left-hander on off; Shivam Dube gets forward to drive to long-on

Matthew Short comes down the track and takes it on the full; he has mistimed this drive; but beats Klaasen's dive to his left at mid-off. Even though Klaasen got a fingertip on it; it r' uns away as Ishan chases from extra-cover. Good over for CSK - 15 off it
slower-ball off-cutter and on a good length on leg-stump; Shivam Dube closes the face of the bat and turns it to deep backward square-leg
full and down leg. Matthew Short flicks and misses; wide called
full and down leg; Matthew Short gets forward to flick to deep backward square-leg
slower and short at Shivam Dube; he rolls his wrists and pulls it down to deep backward square-leg
right up there on the stumps; Matthew Short gets forward and shows the full face of the bat to drive to long-on
slower-ball off-cutter and short of length down leg; Shivam Dube taps the ball on its head; to the right of short fine
low full-toss just outside off; Matthew Short gets forward to drive and mistimes it straight to the fielder at extra-cover
full and wide outside off; Shivam Dube throws the bat on that; the thick outside-edge flies over shrot third man. Good start to the over for CSK
slower-ball off-cutter and short outside off; Shivam Dube goes on the back foot and pulls it between deep mid-wicket and long-on; they run hard and come back for the 2nd
short of length and at the body of Shivam Dube; who goes on the back foot and pulls to deep square-leg

ball_event: out Caught by Aniket Verma!! Good catch at deep mid-wicket and the set Matthew Short goes. Full and shapes back into middle
event_info: Short clears his front leg to heave; hits it flat but he has picked out Aniket. The anchor is gone and Eshan Malinga is pumped. Matthew Short c Aniket Verma b Eshan Malinga 34(30) [4s-3]
full outside off; Jamie Overton gets forward to drive it hard and straight to long-off. Showed the full-face
low full-toss and angling away from the left-hander; looked like it was wide of the tramline; Shivam Dube reaches for it as he looks to open the face; drives and misses. Why did he not review?
right up there on the stumps; Jamie Overton gets forward and nudges it to the right of Sakib Hussain who dives to his right and tries to stop; but misses
slower-ball off-cutter and angling away from the left-hander; short and tennis-ball bounce; called a wide for height
slower-ball off-cutter and well down leg; Shivam Dube gets forward to flick; no mid-wicket and it is a single
wide of the tramline and SRH lose a review. It's a low full-toss and just wide of the tramline on the off-side. Jamie Overton lets it go and immediately asks for a wide. Gets it
full outside off; Jamie Overton gets forward to drive and mistimes it to the left of Sakib Hussain; who gets across and cuts it off. Varun Aaron claps from the dugout
yorker length outside off; Jamie Overton gets forward and jams it out; in front of extra-cover. Just one

ball_event: out Bowled!! That should be the game. Shivam Dube is so disappointed. He has missed a pacy full middle-stump delivery. The seam came out wobbled
event_info: rushed Dube and he is late on the flick. Probably flicked the back pad on the way to the stumps. Dube's feet were cemented and perhaps he was expecting a slower-ball off-cutter into the pitch. Dube shakes his head and takes his time to drag himself off the field. Shivam Dube b Sakib Hussain 21(16) [4s-1 6s-1]
another fine game for Sakib Hussain. It's full on off; Anshul Kamboj gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket. Varun Aaron claps from the dugout in appreciation
full and shapes back in from outside off; Anshul Kamboj gets forward to drive; the thick inside-edge rolls to short fine. Singles won't hurt SRH at this stage
yorker length on off; Jamie Overton clears his front leg and drills it wide of long-on. Klaasen gets across and cuts it off with a dive to his left from long-on. Keeps it to two

Salil Arora has missed an easy run-out. It deflects off Jamie Overton's back pad; rolls to Arora; he had so much time; attempts the overarm throw with the gloves on. Well wide of the stumps. Excellent yorker tailing back into the pads; Overton inside-edges the flick on to the back pad. He wanted a run and was halfway down the pitch when he was sent back

Aniket runs to his left from deep mid-wicket and dives; but the ball slips through. Jamie Overton walked towards this full delivery and flicks it nicely; into the gap and Aniket's effort is not good enough

slower-ball off-cutter and short of length outside off; Jamie Overton goes on the back foot and pulls; Ishan charges in from deep mid-wicket; tries to take it with one hand and fumbles. One turns into two
full and shapes back into middle; Jamie Overton gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket; retains the strike with that run
fine yorker length delivery outside off; Jamie Overton gets forward to drive and Nitish Kumar Reddy tumbles to his right to stop the single
full outside off; in the slot; Jamie Overton gets forward to drive to long-off; wants two but Anshul Kamboj jogs to the other end. They are happy with one in the end
full and wide outside off; Anshul Kamboj reaches for it and carves it; doesn't carry to sweeper cover
full outside off; Jamie Overton gets forward to loft; more off the thick inside half of the bat and down to long-on. One more and the equation gets tougher for CSK

Anshul Kamboj keeps it alive. It's a juicy low full-toss around off; Kamboj gets forward to loft and times it so well. Belted that and it flies over long-on. Just wide of the CSK dugout. Nitish Kumar Reddy closes his eyes in disappointment
way outside off; full and past the tramline; left alone and wide taken

slower-ball off-cutter and on a good length outside off; Anshul Kamboj gets forward to drive; toe-ends it; Livingstone charges in from long-on and throws it; but it's well wide of Nitish Kumar Reddy who can't get it back on the stumps. Jamie Overton was stretching every sinew to make it in. Interesting had Nitish got it on the stumps
low full-toss on middle; Jamie Overton gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket. They take two despite Anshul Kamboj not being that quick
1 run; full and at the pads; Jamie Overton flicks and misses; the ball rolls back to Praful Hinge; he doesn't attempt to throw at either end; there was a chance of a run-out

SRH review for a no-ball. It's over the waist. They will lose this too. Clearly over the waist and Anshul Kamboj swings and misses this one outside off; Salil Arora prevents any runs. A free-hit coming up for Kamboj next. Waist of Kamboj is 1.09m and this went at 1.24m
beautiful yorker just outside off; Anshul Kamboj can only dig it out via a thick inside-edge to deep mid-wicket. Just one

ball_event: out Caught by Liam Livingstone!! Taken at long-off. Full on off
event_info: Jamie Overton gets forward and clears his front leg to loft; couldn't get any timing; he has struggled to hit the ball tonight; finds long-off and Livingstone goes to his left to take it. Praful Hinge celebrates with both arms outstretched and there's relief in Kavya Maran's face. Jamie Overton c Liam Livingstone b Praful Hinge 16(15) [4s-1]

Ishan Kishan claps and Varun Aaron is all smiles in the SRH dugout. It's a full delivery and just outside the leg-stump; Noor Ahmad flicks to deep backward square-leg as he gets forward. Just one and that won't help CSK
SRH win. Ishan with his finger pointed at Praful Hinge celebrates. A low full-toss around leg-stump; Anshul Kamboj gets forward and drives to long-on. SRH win by 10 and the RGIS crowd are elated
